rootCause: The quest completable-item test only treated single-branch dialogue transitions as path-required, so it missed mandatory requirements hidden behind branch-and-loop structures. The hand-crank-generator quest requires a DC motor on a mandatory transition, but that requirement was skipped; because the DC motor also had BETA_PLACEHOLDER pricing, it was not tradeable and the gap went undetected.
resolution: Set a concrete price for the 12 V DC motor and updated the dialogue-path requirement analysis to detect mandatory transitions even when a node branches and loops before progress. Added a regression test covering the branch-and-loop pattern.
